description: Eval cases for Power BI data model design review skill

test_cases.name: Snowflake schema instead of star schema
test_cases.input: Review my Power BI model: I have a Sales fact table, connected to an Orders table, which connects to Customers, which connects to CustomerRegions, which connects to Countries. All relationships are one-to-many.
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must identify multi-hop dimension chain as snowflake anti-pattern and recommend flattening into single dimension

test_cases.name: Bidirectional relationship overuse
test_cases.input: My model has 8 bidirectional relationships between fact and dimension tables. Some reports seem slow. Is this related?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must flag bidirectional relationship overuse as performance issue and recommend single-direction with CROSSFILTER in DAX when needed

test_cases.name: Missing date table
test_cases.input: I'm using the date column directly from my Sales table (Sales[InvoiceDate]) for all time intelligence calculations. Is this a problem?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must recommend creating a dedicated date table and marking it as date table for correct time intelligence

test_cases.name: Pre-production review request
test_cases.input: We are going live with our Power BI model next week. Can you do a pre-production review? Model has: 3 fact tables, 8 dimensions, Import mode, ~50M rows total, RLS implemented.
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must apply Pre-Production Review template: functionality, performance validation, security, go-live readiness

test_cases.name: Many-to-many relationship with text key
test_cases.input: I have a many-to-many relationship between Products and Promotions using a text column ProductCode. Should I be concerned?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Must flag text key in M:M relationship as double performance issue and recommend integer surrogate key + bridge table pattern

test_cases.name: Negative: optimize a specific DAX measure
test_cases.input: Can you optimize this DAX measure? Sales YOY = DIVIDE([Sales] - CALCULATE([Sales], SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR('Date'[Date])), CALCULATE([Sales], SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR('Date'[Date])))
test_cases.evaluation_notes: DAX formula optimization is NOT model design review scope. Must route to power-bi-dax-optimization.

test_cases.name: Negative: active performance troubleshooting
test_cases.input: My report page is taking 20 seconds to load. Users are complaining. What should I check first?
test_cases.evaluation_notes: Active performance diagnosis is NOT model design review scope. Must route to power-bi-performance-troubleshooting.
